queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of negative checking account balances to elevated credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical impact of the absence of a checking account on credit risk drivers and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation of the association between minimal savings account balances and mitigated credit risk exposure.
